indicators.name: yoga mat on floor
indicators.rationale: A yoga mat is present, but it is not unrolled and ready for use.

indicators.name: open floor space
indicators.rationale: There is enough open space for yoga practice, though it is not ideal due to the presence of furniture.

indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring is suitable for yoga practice.

indicators.name: pillow on couch
indicators.rationale: A pillow on the couch obstructs the open floor space.

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for yoga practice. While there is open floor space and hardwood flooring, the presence of a pillow on the couch obstructs the open area. The score is 4 because the space is not fully prepared for yoga practice.
